Off Calendar Jun-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PETITIONER DEL-CAMP INVESTMENTS, INC'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF DAMAGES REGARDING GOVERNMENT IMMUNITY IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 14, 2006 TO BE HEARD BY THE HONORABLE JAMES L. WARREN. =(301/HEK/CK) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; REPORTER: LaVENA WARD, CSR 7077

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Determination Of Damages; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jun-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Francis D. Conway, Esq., of Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer, 397-2800, for Petitioner and Moving Party
Audrey Williams Pearson, Deputy City Attorney, 554-4621, for Respondent and Opposing Party
RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER DEL-CAMP INVESTMENTS, INC.'S Motion For Determination Of Damages, including attorney's fees was taken under submission, but hearing was continued to 6/12/06 regarding government immunity. Simultaneous briefs are due by 6/2/06 and simultaneous replies are due by 6/7/06. (301/JLW/ck) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioner Del-Camp Investment, Inc.'S For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus; Notice Of Lodgement Of Adminstrative Record And Transcript Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Francis Conway, Esq. and Arif Virji, Esq. of Lynch, Gilardi & Grummer, 415-397-2800 for plaintiff and moving party Del-Camp Investments, Inc.
Audrey Williams Pearson, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4621 for defendant and opposing party The Board of Appeals of The City and County of San Francisco

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court GRANTED PETITIONER DEL-CAMP INVESTMENTS, INC.'S Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus. THE CITY WAS DIRECTED TO APPROVE INSTALLATION OF THE WINDOWS. THE COURT MADE A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE. Prevailing party to submit form of order.
ORDER RETURNING ADMINISTARTIVE RECORD TO THE PETITIONER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. ADMINISTARTIVE RECORD WAS RETURNED TO COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER IN COURT. (301/JLW/CK) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioner Del-Camp Investment, Inc.'S For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus; Notice Of Lodgement Of Adminstrative Record And Transcript Of Proceedings
